steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The sentence contains an independent clause ending with “...snow and ice cover,” followed by a noun phrase with an infinitive: “the monkeys to hunt for marine animals...”

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
A participle phrase can follow an independent clause (separated by a comma) to express consequence or result. “Forcing” creates this participial phrase, showing that food unavailability results in the monkeys hunting.

The other options fail: “forces” is a finite verb requiring a coordinating conjunction, “to force” creates a dangling infinitive, and “forced” leaves an incomplete structure.

That matches choice C—C is correct.
